sections.paragraph:
verb לגדום

to cut off, sever, amputate

verb להיגדם

be cut off, severed, amputated

verb לגדם

to cut off, sever, amputate, chop off

verb לגדם (>>גידם)

to cut off, sever, amputate, chop off

masculine noun

stump

masculine noun and adjective גדם (>>גידם)

amputee, one-armed person, armless
